title: GSC Daily Pipeline Cron Repair Report
decision: Phase 19 daily run (3 PM) now pulls GSC at step 2. Pipeline cron (10 AM) kept as early backup.

details.note: Pipeline provides early-morning GSC data. Phase 19 always pulls fresh at step 2 regardless.

no_duplication: Phase 19 reads gsc-live-data-corrected.json but runs pipeline again for freshness. Pipeline cron is a convenience, not a dependency.
